decisions.rationale: Scoping to PO ID eliminates duplicate risk (each PO has 1-5 RFPs max); no migration needed for existing records
Single digits are cleaner; n rarely exceeds 5 (one per tranche); matches user-provided example 'RFP-PO-ID-n'

decisions.decision: No backfill of existing RFP IDs
decisions.rationale: Old RFP-CLMC-### IDs coexist fine in Finance tables (displayed as plain strings); migration would risk corrupting records that already have duplicates
